sprint.name: My Tennis — Tiered Wizard & Enthusiastic Consent
sprint.goal: Reshape the My Tennis form from a single long page of 9 sections into a stepped wizard of 6 priority-ordered tiers, where every tier ends with an equal-weight 'save and finish here' off-ramp and players are encouraged — never pressured — to stop once they've shared enough. Server stores answers as before (admin-readable only), client uses localStorage for in-progress drafts, server tracks only a wizard_progress_tier integer so completion state can be shown without ever serving stored answers back to the player.
focus_areas: Priority-ordered tiers — what captains actually use first, pure colour last
Enthusiastic consent at every tier boundary — equal-weight 'finish here' and 'keep going' CTAs
Privacy preserved — write-only contract intact; only tier completion state ever sent back to the player
No data loss for existing testers — migration backfills wizard_progress_tier from non-null answers
